case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE VS. ARIELLE SWEETMAN et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED, WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SWEETMAN, ARIELLE DOES 1 THRU 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-13-2013

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 19, 2012, TO ALLOW THE MOVING PARTY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE PAPERS SHALL BE LODGED WITH DEPARTMENT 302 BY DECEMBER 5, 2012. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: DIANA CHEN, CSR # 11312

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Granted, with twenty days leave to amend. No opposition filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.

**The court did not sign the proposed judgment submitted to the court via email.**

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. The motion is continued to December 19, 2012, to allow the moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The papers shall be lodged with department 302 by December 5, 2012. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR # 11312 =(302/MJM)
